source_pr.title: planner/core: remove random test to reduce CI time
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #24206 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

The TestListColumnsPartitionPrunerRandom cost 200+s(total tests need 345s)

We move this random test to `utf` to reduce CI time.

The utf pr is [here](https://github.com/pingcap/automated-tests/pull/642)

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: query := fmt.Sprintf("select * from t1 order by id,a,b") (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)
failure_signature: query := fmt.Sprintf("select * from t1 order by id,a,b") (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: query := fmt.Sprintf("select * from t1 order by id,a,b") (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go).
fix_pattern: query := fmt.Sprintf("select * from t1 order by id,a,b") (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)

evidence: evidence: query := fmt.Sprintf("select * from t1 order by id,a,b") (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)
